dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9746 IH: Biomass Facility Construction Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Kiley of California introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to provide investment and production credits for open- and closed-loop biomass facilities.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Biomass Facility Construction Act.

section.header: Reinstatement of investment and production credits for open- and closed-loop biomass facilities

subsection.text: Section 48(a) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating paragraph (16) as paragraph (17), and
by inserting after paragraph (15) the following new paragraph:

paragraph.header: Application of credit to certain biomass facilities

subparagraph.text: In the case of any qualified property (as defined in paragraph (5)(D)) which is part of a specified biomass facility—

clause.text: such property shall be treated as energy property for purposes of this section, and
the energy percentage with respect to such property is 30 percent.

subparagraph.text: For purposes of this paragraph, the term specified biomass facility means any facility—

clause.text: described in paragraph (2) or (3) of section 45(d), and
the construction of which begins after the date of the enactment of the Biomass Facility Construction Act.

paragraph.text: Section 45(d) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended—

subparagraph.text: in paragraphs (2) and (3), by inserting or after the date of the enactment of the Biomass Facility Construction Act, after January 1, 2025, each place it appears, and
in paragraph (3)(A)(ii), by inserting , or after the date of the enactment of the Biomass Facility Construction Act after January 1, 2025.

paragraph.text: Section 45(b)(4) of such Code is amended by adding at the end the following new subparagraph:

subparagraph.text: Subparagraphs (A) and (B) shall not apply to any facility described in paragraph (2) or (3) of subsection (d) the construction of which begins after the date of the enactment of the Biomass Facility Construction Act.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply to facilities the construction of which begins after the date of the enactment of this Act.
